settings.heading: Feel
settings.subheading: Skincare born from the language of desire

settings.heading:
Skincare is not
just a routine.
settings.body: Valentina was born from the belief that beauty is a feeling — not a formula. Each creation is a love letter to your skin: sensory, considered, deeply intentional.

settings.heading: Where craft meets
settings.body1: Each formulation is a dialogue between French heritage and modern science. We work with master perfumers in Grasse, biochemists in Paris, and ethical growers across the Mediterranean.
settings.body2: Our laboratory is small. Our standards are uncompromising. Every ingredient earns its place — chosen not for trend, but for truth.

settings.heading: Sleeplift
settings.body1: An overnight ritual born from twelve months of research. A constellation of bakuchiol, niacinamide, and seven hand-picked botanicals that work in concert with your skin's natural rhythm.
settings.body2: Wake to skin that feels remembered. Plump, radiant, transformed.

settings.title: Cleanse
settings.body: Begin in stillness. Wash away the day with our cleansing balm — a slow ceremony of melting, breathing, returning.

settings.title: Tone
settings.body: Mist of rose and witch hazel. A soft veil that prepares the skin for what comes next, restoring its natural balance.

settings.title: Treat
settings.body: Targeted serums — luminosity, vitality, longevity. Choose your need; trust the science woven into every drop.

settings.title: Nourish
settings.body: Seal it all in. The Velvet Cream becomes a final gesture of self-love — comforting, occlusive, deeply hydrating.

settings.quote: True beauty is not painted on the surface. It rises from beneath, slowly, like dawn.
settings.author: Valentina, Founder

settings.heading: Bright 24/7
settings.body1: A morning serum infused with stabilised vitamin C, mushroom-derived ferulic acid, and a custom complex of marine antioxidants — designed to defend your skin against urban light, screens, and the slow erosion of time.
settings.body2: Dermatologically tested. Visibly transformative. The first chapter of your day, rewritten.

settings.quote: Valentina is the first skincare line that feels like poetry. Six weeks in, my skin is calmer, brighter — but more than that, my mornings feel sacred again.
settings.author: Sophia M.

settings.quote: I have sensitive skin and have tried everything. The Velvet Cream is the only product that has never let me down. The texture is divine — like a whispered promise.
settings.author: Mei L.

settings.quote: These are not products. They are a philosophy bottled. The packaging alone has reframed how I see my own bathroom counter.
settings.author: Catherine V.

settings.heading: Beauty,
settings.body1: From sustainable sourcing in the Mediterranean to refillable porcelain vessels designed to live on your shelf for a lifetime — every choice we make is an act of intention.
settings.body2: Cruelty-free, vegan, and crafted with reverence for the earth that gives us so much.

settings.heading: Letters from
settings.body: Slow rituals, new launches, founder reflections. No noise — just intention, delivered to your inbox.
settings.footnote: By subscribing you agree to our Privacy Policy.
